title: Amid ‘Khoon Ki Holi’ Threat On Eid, Delhi's Uttam Nagar Muslims Shower Rose Petals On Cops After Peaceful Prayers | WATCH
description: With khoon ki holi threat looming, a heartwarming video on social media shows two men scattering flower petals over police officers and Rapid Action Force personnel where one of them can be heard praising the authorities, saying the police provided full support and did an excellent job.
